Later, we talked about a visit to the zoo.
In our town zoo, the biggest animal is the elephant.
“ Which book do you like the most?
I took one from my bag.
“ I think this book is the most interesting.
“ Among all subjects, I think English is the most important,” Tom said.
“ Of all the seasons, I like summer the best,” I answered with a smile.
“ Who is the fastest runner in our class?
Everyone answered together, “ It is Tom.
